results.validation_notes: Previous Microservices classification was incorrect: docker-compose.yml shows a single Python server (mage_ai/server/server.py) with a frontend container, not independent deployable services. The integrations/ Dockerfiles are deployment variants for different environments (Spark, Databricks, Hadoop), not microservices. Event-Driven was overstated—no message broker configuration in docker-compose.yml. Pipe-and-Filter is correct as the primary style (this is an ETL/data pipeline tool). Modular Monolith is more accurate than Microservices given the single deployment unit with internal module boundaries.
